entries.prompt: IDENTITY (must match reference image exactly): Human WOMAN, ~28, long golden-blond wavy hair in a combat braid over the shoulder, bright blue eyes, determined adult female face (NO beard), tall athletic build. OUTFIT: polished silver-steel plate armor with rounded segmented pauldrons and layered cuirass, bluish highlights, brown leather straps. No tabard, no cape, no helm. WEAPONS: longsword, brown leather hilt. POSE (east_block): side-profile east-facing, longsword held vertically in front of the body as a guard, blade pointing up, both hands on the grip, chin tucked behind the crossguard, both legs visible. FRAMING (non-negotiable): FULL-BODY head-to-toe inside the 256x256 canvas. Feet ~6-8% clearance above bottom edge (NEVER cropped, NEVER cut off, do not crop feet). Head ~6-8% headroom above hair. Figure ~85% of canvas height, centered. Camera pulled back. STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow. NEGATIVE: do not crop feet, do not crop weapon, do not zoom in.
entries.notes: Feet-cut-off fix; east_attack used as SpriteCook reference.
